sources.description: Translated by William R. Clark. From Ante-Nicene Fathers, Vol. 6, Edited by Alexander Roberts, James Donaldson, and A. Cleveland Coxe, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1886. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.
